title: 2018 Census table finder | Stats NZ
content:
## 2018 Census table finder
30 March 2021, 4:00pm
Find all datasets and tables from our 2018 Census publications with the 2018 Census table finder.
The table finder is a filterable Excel spreadsheet that contains names of all the tables provided in 2018 Census data releases and links to the publications or tools they are in.
You can filter by variable, topic, and geography.
- Education and training
- Ethnicity, culture, and identity
- Families and households
- Population and migration
- Travel to work and education
- Work, income, and unpaid activities.
Data is available for the following geographic breakdowns:
- territorial authority (cities and districts)
- Auckland local board
- district health board area
- statistical area 2 (small areas)
- statistical area 1 (very small areas).

## Subscribe to our newsletter
Subscribe to the Census Advisory newsletter to keep up to date with census information.
Contact our Information centre if you've got a question about finding or using our data.
- 2018 Census table finder Excel spreadsheet, 881 KB
